milk chocolate * 54% (raw cane sugar *, cocoa butter *, whole milk powder *, cocoa mass *, bourbon vanilla extract *), rice cakes * 40% (whole rice * 99%, sesame) *, sea salt), grated coconut * 6%
* organic farming
may contain traces of soya and nuts,

* agricoltura biologica
Può contenere tracce di soia e noci.
